case_title: GOVIND B. PATEL VS. LEE LEWIS et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT LEWIS, LEE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, GOVIND B. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEWIS, LEE SCRIBNER, LYNN KYLE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1657 MARKET STREET #46, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103 $1,707.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,707.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT LEWIS, LEE
REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON SEP-11-2003 IN DEPT. 206. DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. DEMAND FOR JURY TRIAL STRICKEN.
MINUTES FOR SEP-15-2003 9:10 AM FOR DEPT 303
EXECUTION FOR MONEY, POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, LEE SCRIBNER, LYNN KYLE
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-11-2003 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206
MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-15-2003 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT ON SEP-15-2003 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206; JURY DEMAND STRICKEN; FTA BY DEFT AT SETT CONF

MATTER CAME ON CALENDAR FOR PROVE-UP. WITNESS SWORN AND EXHIBIT RECEIVED IN EVIDENCE. JUDGMENT SIGNED BY THE COURT FOR PAST DUE RENT AND DAMAGES PLUS COSTS. HON. PERKER L. MEEKS, JR., CLERK SADIE LI, REPORTER MAURA BALDOCCHI #5207. (303)

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY, POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, LEE SCRIBNER, LYNN KYLE
